chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 29 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.153/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.154/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of protective bail 13.01.2026 Mr. Amanullah G. Malik, Advocate along with applicants / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicants / accused Muhammad Nadeem alias Nadeem and Aijaz Ahmed alias Aijaz, both sons of Abdul Ghani Jagirani seek protective bail in Crime No.28/2023, registered at Police Station Dubbar, District Sukkur, under Sections 302, 311, 34, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicants / accused are prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehend their arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicants / accused for a period of five days, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBWs, if any, shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicants / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicants surrender before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
